name: stackra/ai
purpose: AI orchestration — AiConversation, AiRun, AiToolCall, AiDraft (draft-then-confirm envelope), and AiEmbedding vector store for RAG search.
capabilities: AiDraft draft-then-confirm envelope for WriteMode::Draft tools
AiEmbedding vector embedding for RAG search
when_to_use: Exposing AI-powered features to end users with audit + confirmation + entitlement gates.
when_not_to_use: For non-AI product-analytics events, use the sibling stackra/analytics package.
